a.content: Petra will send the signed SOW for the Baltic Retail analytics project.
a.source: Petra says she'll send over the signed SOW for the Baltic Retail analytics project.

b.content: Petra will prepare the final report for the Baltic Retail analytics project.
b.source: Petra is preparing the final report for the Baltic Retail analytics project.

notes: FALSE-MERGE TRAP (weight 2): identical entities, same kind, same project — but two different deliverables. A merge destroys one commitment.
